name: basic-debug-memory
description: Basic retrieval ranking checks for verified fixes and rejected fix warnings.

verified_memories.label: next_hydration_fix
verified_memories.summary: Hydration mismatch caused by browser-only localStorage access during render. Fix by moving browser-only state behind client boundary or useEffect.
verified_memories.root_cause: Browser-only state was read during server/client render mismatch.
verified_memories.fix_pattern: Move localStorage access into useEffect or use a deterministic server render.
anti_patterns: Do not suppress hydration warning as the primary fix.

verified_memories.label: pytest_assertion_fix
verified_memories.summary: Pytest assertion failed because endpoint returned the original number instead of square.
verified_memories.root_cause: Business logic returned number instead of number * number.
verified_memories.fix_pattern: Fix implementation logic instead of weakening assertion.
anti_patterns: Do not change the test expectation when implementation is wrong.

verified_memories.label: ts_prop_type_fix
verified_memories.summary: TS prop type mismatch fixed by updating shared prop interface instead of casting to any.
verified_memories.root_cause: Component props and shared type definition drifted.
verified_memories.fix_pattern: Update shared TypeScript interface and call sites consistently.
anti_patterns: Do not use any cast to hide the mismatch.

verified_memories.label: generic_react_fact
verified_memories.summary: React components should avoid side effects during render.
verified_memories.content: General React fact. This should not outrank project-specific verified debug fixes.

user_corrections.label: reject_suppress_hydration_warning
user_corrections.context: Agent suggested suppressHydrationWarning for hydration mismatch.
user_corrections.user_feedback: Do not hide hydration mismatch in this project.
user_corrections.preferred_pattern: client boundary or deterministic server render
user_corrections.future_rule: Avoid suppressHydrationWarning as the primary fix for hydration mismatch.

user_corrections.label: reject_any_cast
user_corrections.context: Agent suggested casting a TypeScript value to any.
user_corrections.user_feedback: Do not use any to bypass type errors.
user_corrections.future_rule: Avoid any casts for TypeScript mismatch. Fix the type definition or call site.

cases.name: next hydration localStorage retrieves verified fix
cases.query: Next.js hydration mismatch localStorage text content did not match server rendered html

cases.name: pytest assertion retrieves python fix
cases.query: pytest assertion failed endpoint returned original number instead of square

cases.name: typescript mismatch avoids any cast warning
cases.query: TypeScript prop type mismatch should we cast as any

cases.name: metadata match beats generic react fact
cases.query: hydration mismatch during render browser state
